name: Oat Bran Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine the water, bananas, egg whites, honey, applesauce, salt, wheat germ, gluten, whole-wheat flour, oat bran, bread flour, rolled oats, and yeast.
3. Mix all ingredients until well combined.
4. Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan.
5. Bake for 45-50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Allow the bread to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before removing it from the pan and serving.
